_source: Parsed 2026-07-24 from: 'Mad Benji FOH floor station on duty SOP .pdf', BARISTA_ON_DUTY_SOP.docx, BAR_ON_DUTY_SOP.docx (in ~/Downloads). Field shape validated against src/pages/restaurantgroup/SOPsPage.js saveSop payload — cat (not area), steps [{heading, items[]}] with plain-string items, no sop flag.

sops.title: FOH Floor Station – On Duty
sops.desc: Floor station procedure during service — customer service, seating, orders, tables and departure.

steps.heading: Customer Service
items: Greet every customer.
Ask: "How are you today?"
Ask if they are: Dine In / Takeaway / Pick-Up

steps.heading: Queue Management
items: Manage the full queue first; do not serve customers individually out of sequence.

steps.heading: Seating Customers
items: Direct and seat customers before providing menus and water.
Ensure customers are comfortably seated.

steps.heading: Greeting While Multitasking
items: Greet customers while: taking orders
Running food
Running drinks
Cleaning tables
Walking through the venue
Going to outdoor areas
Speaking with customers
Speaking with team members
Completing other floor duties

steps.heading: Teamwork
items: Only assist at the bar/counter to take orders when the floor is 100% fully looked after.
If taking orders at the counter and the floor requires attention: finish the current order → inform bar/barista staff → then return to floor duties immediately.

steps.heading: Taking Orders
items: Take customer orders accurately.
Process and put through orders correctly.
Put menus away after taking orders.

steps.heading: Table Setup
items: Set up cutlery and napkins as required.
Ensure tables are clean and ready for service.
If there are crumbs or dust on sitting benches or the floor, give the area a quick sweep.
Salt, pepper, and sugar setup: wall/window side tables against the wall/window; freestanding tables in the centre.

steps.heading: Water Service
items: Place water bottles and water cups on all dining tables.
Replace empty water bottles when required.

steps.heading: During Dining
items: Run food and drinks promptly.
Check in with customers.
Ask: "How is everything today?"

steps.heading: Clearing Tables
items: Clear finished meals and drinks promptly.
Keep tables clean and presentable throughout service.

steps.heading: Customer Departure
items: Thank customers when leaving.
Ensure every customer leaves feeling acknowledged and appreciated.

steps.heading: Customer Feedback
items: We love feedback.
Report any customer feedback, suggestions, or complaints to management.

sops.title: Barista On Duty
sops.desc: Barista station procedure — coffee order priorities, call-outs, downtime tasks and pre-break restock.

steps.heading: Rules
items: Your job is not just making coffee.
Greet customers while you are making coffee or doing other tasks.
Clean station as you go.

steps.heading: Coffee Orders
items: Prioritise coffee orders: 1. Takeaway no food · 2. Dine in · 3. Takeaway with food · 4. Pick ups · 5. Uber & DoorDash.
Takeaway orders (food takes longer during busy times) — make immediately for: all rolls (Benji Roll, Hash Brown Roll, Egg & Bacon Roll).
Delay slightly or ask kitchen for the rest: Croissants (5 minutes), Toasties (6–8 minutes), Bagels (6–8 minutes), Burgers (6–8 minutes), Wings (10–15 minutes), Breakfast (15 minutes).

steps.heading: Call Out Orders
items: Clearly call out when orders are ready for handing out or pickup (drinks only, or combined drinks and food).

steps.heading: When Coffee Orders Are Under Control (less than 2–3 orders and they are fresh/new)
items: Restock coffee station for next rush.
Rinse all cloths & group handle.
Serve counter customers.
Assign tables and provide menus and water to waiting / to-be-seated customers.
Help running food and drinks.
Sort out Uber and DoorDash orders.
Make or assist with cold drinks to free up bar staff for other tasks.
Put away dirty dishes on the bench.
Load dirty dishes onto a tray and take them to the dishwasher before returning to fresh/new coffee orders.
Polish and put away clean dishes before returning to fresh/new coffee orders.
Bring dirty dishes to kitchen.
Wash cutlery if kitchen is busy.
Empty bins, milk crates, knock tube.
Make retail coffee bags.

steps.heading: Before Break
items: Restock coffee station.
Restock any milk if running very low.
Empty bins, milk crates, and knock tube.

sops.title: Bar On Duty
sops.desc: Bar station procedure — counter service, order names, handover, cold drinks priorities and downtime tasks.

steps.heading: Rules
items: Greet customers at all times unless you are serving someone at the counter.
Keep bench & ice cream freezer clear — remove dirty dishes immediately.
Keep ice cream freezer sliding doors clear at all times.

steps.heading: Counter Service
items: Greet customers with a smile.
Ask customers: dine-in / takeaway / phone order / online order.
Phone order: needs to pay at counter.
Online order: already paid.

steps.heading: Dine-in
items: When floor staff is busy, seat them and provide menu and water.
Assign them to floor staff.
Dine-in order at counter: record name as "Dine in".

steps.heading: Takeaway & Phone Orders — Always Take Names
items: Takeaway — record name as: TA Cassie / TA Cassie with food / TA Cassie with toasties.
Phone order — record name as: PU Imogen / PU Imogen with food / PU Imogen with benji roll.

steps.heading: Completed Order Handover
items: Hand over drinks / food / combined.
Uber & DoorDash: confirm driver app name and order details.

steps.heading: Heat Lamp
items: Put ready orders under heat lamp.
Heat lamp OFF for: poke bowl / açai / pancake / French toast.

steps.heading: Cold Drinks
items: Make cold drinks while balancing counter & waiting / to-be-seated customers.
Prioritise orders: 1. Takeaway no food · 2. Dine in · 3. Takeaway food · 4. Pick up orders · 5. Uber / DoorDash.

steps.heading: Group Orders
items: Check dine-in / takeaway.
Batch same drinks — e.g. 3 iced latte base / 2 berry madness / 4 chocolate milkshake.

steps.heading: Dishes
items: Wash and polish dishes when they run out, including teaspoons.

steps.heading: When Drinks Under Control (less than 2–3 orders and they are fresh/new)
items: Remove dirty dishes on bench immediately.
Help running food and drinks.
Help floor staff.
Sort out Uber/DoorDash orders.
Load dirty dishes onto tray and take them to dishwasher before returning to fresh/new orders.
Polish and put away clean dishes before returning to fresh/new orders.
Bring dirty dishes to kitchen.
Wash cutlery if kitchen is busy.
Empty juicer basket, milk crate, bins.
Make retail coffee bags.

steps.heading: Help Barista ONLY When Busy
items: Pull shots.
Top up coffee beans.
Top up milk.
Top up takeaway cups & lids.
Empty knock tube.
